metadata.description: Speech-to-Text test cases for Whisper API evaluation

test_cases.text: Hello
Yes thank you
I want to work out today
What exercises do you recommend for abs?
How can I lose weight quickly?
How many repetitions should I do?
What is the proper technique for squats?
I want a beginner workout program that includes full body exercises three times a week
Can you explain the difference between aerobic and anaerobic exercise and which is better for weight loss?
I have shoulder pain when doing presses, what should I watch out for to avoid injury?
What nutrition do you recommend before and after workouts for optimal results in building muscle mass?
I work out four times a week but I'm not seeing results in my weight. I eat healthy and sleep enough but my metabolism seems slow. What else can I do to speed up fat loss without losing muscle mass?
test_cases.description: Complex problem description requiring detailed advice

test_cases.text: I want to start CrossFit but I'm worried about injuries because I've heard a lot of negative things. What precautions should I take as a beginner and how can I make sure I execute exercises correctly without hurting my joints?

I have type 2 diabetes and my doctor told me to exercise regularly. What exercises are safe for me, how intense should the workout be, and what should I watch out for regarding blood sugar levels before and after exercise?
I am 35 years old, weigh 185 pounds, and I'm 5 feet 9 inches tall
I do 3 sets of 12 repetitions with 45 pounds
Can I do deadlifts, squats, and bench press on the same day?
What should I eat for pre-workout energy and post-workout recovery?
Protein, carbohydrates, fats, vitamins, minerals
Anaerobic, aerobic, metabolism, hypertrophy, mitochondria
